price: A la carte (items priced individually, typically $3-$25)
hours: Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner (specific times vary by day/sailing, generally Breakfast: 7:30 AM - 10:30 AM, Lunch: 12:00 PM - 2:30 PM, Dinner: 5:30 PM - 9:30 PM)
reservations: Walk-in (reservations not typically available or required)
signature_dishes: Emeril's New Orleans Style Barbeque Shrimp
what_makes_it_unique: It is celebrity chef Emeril Lagasse's first restaurant at sea, bringing his signature New Orleans-inspired Creole and Cajun cuisine to Carnival. The bistro offers a vibrant atmosphere with a focus on fresh seafood and classic dishes.
